Petition By Attorney - Creditor For Approval Of Claim
Off Calendar Mar-28-2008 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia for Petitioner.

Mr. Garcia stated that the interest was charged at the statutory rate of 10% and that the property was sold in August of 2007. The Court stated that there would be a reduction in the interest amount. The interest is to be based on the amount of $3,789.00 from the date of the sale of the property to today. The attorney's fees and costs are approved. The matter was granted subject to a written order. Counsel will prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M .Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1575 31st Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Robert Garcia appearing for petitioner.
The sale is confirmed at 843,888.00. The proceeds are to be deposited into a blocked account.
Status for filing receipts on blocked account is set for 11/06/07. Counsel is to submit an order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Tony Aguerre Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

MINI MINUTES: Robert Garica appearing for petitioner. The supplement to the 2nd amended petition was filed. Petition is granted with notice to the heirs is dispense with. Bond is fixed in the amount of $10,000.00. Counsel will prepare order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
